note:
Gold是一家旨在绘制人类所有知识的初创公司，该公司周三宣布，该公司为首轮融资筹集了1450万美元。
安德森·霍洛维茨(Andreessen Horowitz)在一份声明中表示，该公司牵头进行了这轮融资，参与融资的投资者包括鱼叉风险投资公司(Harpoon Ventures)、DCVC和Gigafund。A16z联合创始合伙人马克·安德森将加入Golden的董事会。
Golden使用人工智能、机器学习和人类来收集各种主题的公共信息。根据首席执行官裘德·戈米拉(Jude Gomila)的说法，大多数信息都是零散的，戈尔登从新闻文章和数据库等来源汇编这些信息。
戈米拉说：“我们的大愿景是，我们正试图建立一个庞大的知识数据库，这最终将覆盖所有领域。”他补充说，该公司最初专注于科学、技术和公司。
新的资金将主要用于扩大戈登的团队。Gomila说，虽然公司总部设在旧金山，但它会在人才所在的地方招聘员工，尽管公司的员工基础将倾向于更多地在美国工作。该公司约有15名员工，并计划将员工人数增加一倍。
投资公司、公司和政府实体使用Golden来更好地了解他们感兴趣的任何主题，并需要有关的全面信息。最近，戈尔登与美国空军签署了一份价值100万美元的合同，以帮助其回应新冠肺炎。
Gomila说：“公司规模越大，就越需要了解正在发生的事情。”“还有对知识的需求。”
新一轮融资使Golden的总融资达到1950万美元。该公司上一轮种子融资是在2019年5月，融资500万美元。
note_en:
Golden , a startup aiming to map all human knowledge, raised $14.5 million for its Series A round, the company announced Wednesday.
  Andreessen Horowitz  (a16z) led the round, with participation from investors including   Harpoon Ventures ,   DCVC  and   Gigafund , according to a statement from the company. A16z co-founding partner   Marc Andreessen  will join Golden’s board of directors.
 Golden uses artificial intelligence, machine learning and humans to collect public information on various topics. Most of the information is fragmented, according to CEO   Jude Gomila , and Golden compiles that information from sources like news articles and databases.
 “The big vision is we’re trying to build a big database of knowledge and this is across everything eventually,” Gomila said, adding that the company is initially focusing on science, technology and companies.
 The new funding will be used primarily for expanding Golden’s team. While the company is based in San Francisco, it is hiring where the talent is, Gomila said, although the company’s employee base will tend to be more U.S.-based. The company has about 15 employees and is planning on doubling its headcount.
 Investment firms, companies and government entities use Golden to get a better picture of whatever topic they’re interested in and need comprehensive information about. Recently, Golden signed a $1 million contract with the U.S. Air Force to help with its response to COVID-19.
 “The larger the company, the more of a need for visibility of what’s going on,” Gomila said. “There’s also a need for knowledge.”
 The new round brings Golden’s total funding to $19.5 million. The company last raised a $5 million   seed round  in May 2019.
title: Golden旨在使用人工智能与人类一起绘制所有人类知识的地图，以收集公共信息，该公司筹集了1450万美元的首轮融资，由a16z牵头
title_en: Golden, which aims to map all human knowledge using AI alongside humans to collect public information, raises $14.5M Series A led by a16z

在10月发布之夜，谷歌发布了Nest Audio，这是对最初Google Home扬声器的重大改造，10月5日上市，售价99美元。
在去年的Made by Google活动上，该公司对广受欢迎的Home Mini扬声器进行了改造，并将其置于Nest品牌之下。今年，Nest扬声器阵容正在扩大，推出了一款售价99美元的新扬声器，完美地填补了最初的Google Home扬声器留下的空白。Google Home扬声器于2016年推出，最近停产。
就像我们在7月份谷歌的预告片中看到的那样，Nest Audio呈现出枕头的形状，这应该有助于它在几乎任何家庭都能很好地融入其中。而且，为了更好地适应您的个人设计品味，扬声器有多种颜色可供选择，包括粉笔、木炭、沙子、天空和与Pixel5相匹配的“圣人”绿色。
就像之前的Home Mini、Nest Mini和Nest Wifi扬声器一样，新的Nest Audio支持调节音量等触控功能。左上角和右上角分别控制音量的大小，而其间的空间则充当一个大的播放/暂停按钮。在后面，你会发现一个麦克风的物理静音开关，还有一个用于供电的桶形插孔。
至于Nest Audio的实际音频，这款智能扬声器的内置19 mm高音扬声器和75 mm中低音扬声器应该会提供令人印象深刻的体验，比之前的中档Google Home产品更接近更大的Home Max扬声器。和往常一样，您可以加倍使用第二个Nest Audio，并将它们配对，以便将合适的立体声音响带入您的房间。
总而言之，Nest Audio是一个非常棒的套餐，对于大多数人来说，它应该是最好的Google Nest扬声器。更重要的是，10月5日，你可以在谷歌商店上花99美元-比最初的谷歌主页便宜30美元-购买新的智能扬声器。
这篇文章最初报道Nest Audio将于今天发布，现已更新以反映官方的10月5日发布日期。

note_en:
During Launch Night In, Google unveiled Nest Audio, a major revamp of the original Google Home speaker, and it’s available on October 5 for $99.
  At last year’s Made by Google event, the company revamped the popular Home Mini speaker and brought it under the Nest branding. This year, the Nest speaker lineup is expanding with a new $99 speaker to slot perfectly into the gap left by the original Google Home speaker which launched in 2016 and was  recently discontinued.
 Just as we saw in Google’s teaser  way back in July, the Nest Audio takes on a pillow shape which should help it blend in well in most any home. And, to better suit it to your personal design tastes, the speaker is available in a variety of colors including Chalk, Charcoal, Sand, Sky, and a “Sage” green that matches the Pixel 5.
 Like the Home Mini, Nest Mini, and Nest Wifi speakers before it, the new Nest Audio supports touch controls for adjusting volume and more. The top-left and top-right corners handle volume up and down, respectively, while the space in between acts as a large play/pause button. Around back, you’ll find a physical mute switch for the microphone, along with the barrel jack for the power.
  As for the actual  audio of Nest Audio, the smart speaker’s built-in 19mm tweeter and 75mm mid-woofer should offer an impressive experience closer to the larger Home Max speaker than the previous mid-range Google Home offering. And as always, you can double-down with a second Nest Audio and pair them to get proper stereo sound into your room.
  Altogether, the Nest Audio makes for a fantastic package that should be the best Google Nest speaker for most people. More importantly, you can buy the new smart speaker October 5 for $99 — $30 less than the original Google Home — on the  Google Store.
 This article initially reported that the Nest Audio would be available today, and has been updated to reflect the official October 5 release date.

跳到主要内容如果您从Verge链接购买内容，Vox Media可能会赚取佣金。请参阅我们的道德声明。
新的Chromecast是一款与最初的35美元流媒体棒大不相同的产品，早在2013年，流媒体棒就被证明是谷歌出人意料的硬件畅销产品。2020 Chromecast不再是需要你使用智能手机或PC播放和控制内容的基本界面，而是发展到提供更丰富、功能更全的流媒体体验，更类似于Roku、亚马逊Fire TV或Apple TV。
它有一个由谷歌(Google)设计的全新用户界面(构建在Android TV之上)，其中充斥着Netflix、Prime Video、Disney Plus和HBO Max等流行服务的内容。您可以使用包装盒中附带的普通遥控器导航该内容。作为一个流媒体小工具，Chromecast几乎勾选了所有重要的东西：它支持4K，支持Dolby Vision和Dolby Atmos，并且有大量的应用程序可供选择。
全称为“谷歌电视Chromecast”的Chromecast从今天开始发售，售价为49.99美元，这一价格使谷歌与Roku的流媒体Stick Plus和亚马逊的Fire TV Stick 4K不相上下。它也比谷歌的Chromecast Ultra便宜20美元，Chromecast Ultra没有遥控器，也没有自己的电视接口。
在使用了新的Chromecast几天后，我对新的Google TV软件非常满意，它非常强调发现和帮助你找到值得观看的东西。而且这些变化并不是以牺牲功能为代价的；你仍然可以从你的手机、平板电脑或电脑向Chromecast投放内容-比方说，如果一个朋友过来想用他们的手机给你看一段视频或播放一首歌。
和前几代一样，这款Chromecast是一个可以插入电视HDMI接口的加密狗，但它有一个更柔软的椭圆形，表面是哑光的。与老款机型不同的是，老款机型有时可以从电视的USB端口获得足够的电力，而这款机型必须插入随附的7.5瓦电源模块。不过，至少谷歌在Chromecast上已经改用USB-C了。
Chromecast现在运行的是Android TV操作系统，这意味着你有各种各样的应用程序可供选择。除了一款Apple TV Plus应用程序(谷歌的平台上目前还没有这款应用程序)外，Chromecast的流媒体服务花名册上没有明显的漏洞。HBO Max和孔雀都已经可以使用了，Netflix，Prime Video，Hulu，Disney Plus，Vudu，Plex，以及几乎任何你想要的东西都已经可以使用了。
哦，一个好的遥控器能带来多大的不同啊。Chromecast的新遥控器看起来和感觉上都像是一个设计精良的极简主义Roku遥控器(不幸的是，没有耳机插孔)。它紧凑、舒适，D-pad下面的按钮间距很大。有一个谷歌助手按钮，你可以按住它进行语音搜索，当然还有YouTube(当然)和Netflix的快捷方式。遥控器同时使用HDMI-CEC和IR，因此它有电源和音量按钮。还有一个输入键，可以将你的电视切换到Chromecast，所以你也不需要伸手去拿另一个遥控器来做这件事。它是由两个AAA电池供电的，这两个电池很方便地包括在盒子里。
使用遥控器进行语音搜索几乎总是可靠的。有一次，我搜索了“汤姆·汉克斯的电影”，结果显示YouTube上的非法内容排在首位，但我再也没有遇到过那个有趣的漏洞。使用谷歌助手，你可以说“在Netflix上看社交困境”或“在Disney Plus上看曼达洛人”之类的话，你就会直接跳到那个内容。搜索“给我看奥斯卡获奖电影”的结果和你预期的一样，尽管“给我看烂番茄评分在90%或更高的电影”对助手来说还是太多了。子宫子宫。
你可以潜入你最喜欢的流媒体应用程序，像平常一样使用它们，我发现自己做了很多事情。但这款Chromecast最大的新功能--也是其他安卓电视设备无法提供的--是“谷歌电视”软件，它完全取代了普通的安卓电视主屏幕。谷歌提出的用户体验外观和感觉都非常熟悉。在视觉上，它与亚马逊的Fire电视界面很接近。在功能上，它的目标是实现与Apple TV应用程序相同的、全面的聚合。
谷歌电视试图打破流媒体平台之间的壁垒，将它们所有的电影和节目并排放在一起。它被分成不同的部分-为你、电影、节目、应用程序和图书馆-你可以从顶部导航栏在它们之间切换。浏览前三个，你会发现一个非常类似Netflix的布局，内容行按流派或其他链接它们的类别分组。(动作秀，奥斯卡获奖电影，真正的犯罪节目…。你明白我的意思了。)。每一行都结合了你所期望的所有大型服务的内容，并使每个标题的来源变得非常明显。当你滚动浏览大多数节目和电影时，你还会看到烂番茄的平均水平。
你可以告诉Google TV你为哪些流媒体应用付费，这些应用将在你的推荐中优先考虑。但这并不意味着你永远不会从你没有订阅的应用程序中得到建议；我没有HBO Max，但谷歌电视在电影部分仍然非常依赖它。支付的租金和购买也包括在这些内容的旋转木马中。如果你没有订阅某项服务，或者如果谷歌电视正在向你推送租赁服务，你会在内容下面看到一个锁图标，以表明这一点。(在您登录到每个应用程序后，锁定就会消失。)。你还会偶尔看到免费的、有广告支持的服务推荐，比如Tubi TV或Crackle。
没有办法告诉Google TV完全停止包含特定的服务，但你可以长按遥控器上的中心按钮来喜欢或不喜欢个别内容，或者在你的观看列表中添加一些内容。点击每个项目将打开一个详细信息页面，其中包含CAST信息和相关建议。如果有多种流媒体方式，你也会在这个屏幕上看到；免费选项或现有订阅总是被给予更高的排名。
谷歌电视软件似乎非常擅长聚合各地的内容。对于像Sling TV这样的服务来说，这可能会有令人惊讶的帮助。我通常只是用它来直播电视节目，但谷歌的软件突出了我的订阅中有多少点播内容。说到电视服务，如果你是YouTube电视的客户，你会看到Google TV主界面上添加了一个“实时”标签，它会把你直接带到频道指南。这是一个很好的触摸。谷歌表示，直播电视选项卡的API也可用于其他服务，并且已经在与Sling合作。
使用谷歌电视时，你不会发现任何明目张胆的广告--至少不会像Roku OS上的横幅广告或Fire TV上清晰的“赞助”广告那样。但其中一些建议感觉像是有偿安置。我对观看迪士尼Plus的第二胎皇室秘密协会(Secret Society Of Second Born Royals)非常感兴趣，但它是轮流挑选的，在For You选项卡的顶部有巨大的艺术品。如果这是最糟糕的结果，我可以忍受。也有“谷歌热门”和“YouTube推荐视频”的栏，但它是谷歌的产品。你还指望什么呢？哦，但是“库”选项卡确实需要做很多工作。哪里都有大型电影图书馆吗？现在，它只在单个水平行中显示所有内容。谷歌，你真的不可能降低它的效率。
如果你非常不喜欢谷歌电视，有一种“仅限应用程序模式”可以在隐藏所有推荐的设置中启用，而不显示在你的主屏幕上。但这是一个极端的步骤，因为它也完全禁用了搜索和谷歌助手。它严重阻碍了Chromecast的运行，真的没有必要这么做--特别是因为它是同一个主屏幕，只是在你的一排应用程序下面没有推荐而已。你最好还是买点别的东西吧。
但如果你真的选择Chromecast，你会对它的流媒体质量感到满意。它始终如一地下载优秀的4K HDR流，没有任何明显的伪装或缓冲中断。当你四处浏览时，性能通常是有响应的，但我确实遇到了一些迟缓的情况-而且你偶尔会看到一个空白的主屏幕，上面有一个加载动画，因为Chromecast正在工作来填充所有东西。
在这一切之下，Android TV仍在运行，所以你可以一边加载应用程序，一边浏览开发者设置，并试图破解Chromecast，让它做你想做的任何事情。您可以将蓝牙游戏手柄(如Xbox One控制器)与Chromecast配对，然后尝试在该设备上运行Stadia或Xbox流媒体游戏。没有人会阻止你，即使正确的体育场支持要到明年初才会到来。(我已经确认Chromecast将接受一些带以太网的USB-C集线器的有线互联网连接。)。一如既往，谷歌助手可以控制你的智能家居小工具或更新你的天气。你还可以将Chromecast设置为在环境模式下循环浏览你的Google Photos图片库，把你的电视变成一个巨大的相框。
谷歌正在通过新的Chromecast进行重大转变，而这并不是没有缺陷和挫折的。除了前述的迟钝之外，该软件还有一个很小的学习曲线；点击电影或节目的任何常规大小的矩形，你就会进入谷歌电视的详细信息页面，但点击上面的任何较大的横幅，你就会立即进入一个流媒体应用程序。谷歌的“继续观看”功能只支持精选的应用程序-Netflix支持，Prime Video不支持-所以你不能总是快速恢复你刚刚观看的内容。最后，虽然我很欣赏谷歌电视以内容为先的特点，但如果能像安卓电视通常所允许的那样，对主屏进行一定程度的定制，那就太好了。除了按照你想要的方式组织你最喜欢的一排应用程序外，其他一切都被抛弃了，取而代之的是一种更简单的靠背体验。
即便如此，我仍认为搭载谷歌电视的新Chromecast取得了巨大成功。当Chromecast首次亮相时，它作为一款独特的、不可抗拒的廉价流媒体设备脱颖而出。但时代不同了。随着Roku和亚马逊将如此多的价值放在他们自己负担得起的硬件中，谷歌不能再坚持从手机到Chromecast转发内容的相同模式。取而代之的是，它将Chromecast重新发明为一款出色的4K流媒体，使用起来非常容易-事实证明，实际的菜单和遥控器确实很重要-而不会忘记最初的伟大之处。

    The new Chromecast is a much different product than the original $35 streaming stick that proved to be an unexpected hardware hit for Google way back in 2013. Instead of a barebones interface that requires you to play and control content using your smartphone or PC, the 2020 Chromecast has evolved to offer a richer, full-featured streaming experience much more akin to a Roku, Amazon Fire TV, or Apple TV.
 It’s got an all-new user interface designed by Google (and built atop Android TV) that’s flush with content from popular services like Netflix, Prime Video, Disney Plus, and HBO Max. You navigate that content with a normal remote control that comes in the box. And as a streaming gadget, the Chromecast checks off almost everything important: it does 4K, supports Dolby Vision and Dolby Atmos, and has a massive selection of apps at the ready.
 The “Chromecast with Google TV,” as it’s fully called, is available starting today for $49.99, a price that puts Google right in line with Roku’s Streaming Stick Plus and Amazon’s Fire TV Stick 4K. It’s also $20 less than Google’s Chromecast Ultra, which doesn’t have a remote or its own TV interface.
 After spending a few days with the new Chromecast, I’ve been mostly pleased with the new Google TV software, which puts a huge emphasis on discovery and helping you find something to watch. And the changes don’t come at the sacrifice of functionality; you can still cast content to the Chromecast from your phone, tablet, or computer — say, if a friend comes over and wants to show you a video or play a song from their phone.
  Like its recent predecessors, this Chromecast is a dongle that plugs into your TV’s HDMI port, but it’s got a softer oval shape with a matte finish. Unlike older models, which could sometimes get enough power from a TV’s USB port, this one  must be plugged into the accompanying 7.5-watt power brick. But hey, at least Google has switched to USB-C on the Chromecast itself.
 The Chromecast now runs Android TV as its operating system, which means you’ve got a wide variety of apps to choose from. Aside from an Apple TV Plus app, which doesn’t currently exist on Google’s platforms, there are no obvious holes in the Chromecast’s roster of streaming services. HBO Max and Peacock are both available already, as are Netflix, Prime Video, Hulu, Disney Plus, Vudu, Plex, and just about anything else you’ll be looking for.
  And oh, what a difference a good remote makes. The Chromecast’s new remote control looks and feels like a minimalistic, well-designed Roku remote (minus the headphone jack, unfortunately). It’s compact, comfortable, and the buttons beneath the D-pad are well-spaced out. There’s a Google Assistant button, which you can press and hold for voice searches, plus shortcuts for YouTube (of course) and Netflix. The remote uses both HDMI-CEC and IR, so it’s got power and volume buttons. There’s also an input button for switching your TV over to the Chromecast, so you don’t have to reach for another remote to do that, either. It’s powered by two AAA batteries, which are conveniently included in the box.
  Voice search with the remote almost always works reliably. There was one instance where I searched for “movies with Tom Hanks,” and it surfaced illegal YouTube rips above everything else, but I never ran into that amusing bug again. With Google Assistant, you can say things like “watch  The Social Dilemma on Netflix” or “watch  The Mandalorian on Disney Plus” and you’ll jump right to that content. Searches for “show me Academy Award-winning movies” work like you’d expect, though “show me movies with a 90 percent or better rating on Rotten Tomatoes” is still too much for Assistant to figure out. Womp womp.
 You can dive into your favorite streaming apps and use them just like normal, which I’ve found myself doing plenty. But the big new thing with this Chromecast — and something no other Android TV device offers — is the “Google TV” software that completely replaces the regular Android TV home screen. The user experience Google came up with looks and feels pretty familiar. Visually, it’s close to Amazon’s Fire TV interface. Functionally, it aims for the same, comprehensive aggregation as the Apple TV app.
  Google TV attempts to break down the walls between streaming platforms and puts all of their movies and shows side by side. It’s split into different sections — For You, Movies, Shows, Apps, and Library — and you can switch between them from the top navigation bar. Browse the first three and you’ll find a very Netflix-like layout with rows of content grouped by genre or some other category that links them. (Action shows, Oscar-winning movies, true crime shows… you get the idea.) Each row combines content from all the big services you’d expect and makes it very obvious where each title is coming from. You’ll also see a Rotten Tomatoes average for  most shows and movies as you scroll through them.
  You can tell Google TV which streaming apps you pay for, and those will be prioritized in your recommendations. But that doesn’t mean you’ll  never get suggestions from apps you’re not subscribed to; I don’t have HBO Max, but Google TV still leans on it pretty heavily in the Movies section. Paid rentals and purchases are also included in these carousels of content. If you don’t subscribe to a service or if Google TV is pushing a rental on you, you’ll see a lock icon below the content to make this clear. (The lock goes away after you log into each app.) You’ll also see the occasional recommendation from free, ad-supported services like Tubi TV or Crackle.
 There’s no way to tell Google TV to stop including a particular service altogether, but you can long-press the center button on the remote to like or dislike individual content, or add something to your watchlist. Clicking into each item brings up a details page with cast information and related recommendations. And if there are multiple ways of streaming something, you’ll see that on this screen too; free options or existing subscriptions are always given higher rank.
   The Google TV software seems very good at aggregating content from everywhere. This can be surprisingly helpful for services like Sling TV. I typically use it just to stream live TV, but Google’s software highlights just how much on-demand content comes with my subscription. Speaking of TV services, if you’re a YouTube TV customer, you’ll see a “live” tab added to the main Google TV interface, which takes you right to the channel guide. That’s a nice touch. Google says the API for the live TV tab is available to other services and that it’s already working with Sling on it.
 You won’t find any blatant advertising while using Google TV — at least nothing like the banner ads on Roku OS or the clear “sponsored” row on Fire TV. But some of the recommendations feel like paid placement. I couldn’t be less interested in watching Disney Plus’  Secret Society of Second-Born Royals, but it’s among the rotating picks with giant artwork at the top of the For You tab. If that’s the worst that it gets, I can live with it. There are also rows for “trending on Google” and “YouTube recommended videos,” but it’s a Google product. What’d you expect? Oh, but the Library tab does need a lot of work. Got a big Movies Anywhere library? Right now, it just shows everything in a single, horizontal row. You really couldn’t have made it any less efficient, Google.
  If you strongly dislike Google TV, there’s an “apps-only mode” that can be enabled in settings that hides all recommendations from your home screen. But this is a drastic step, as it also completely disables search and Google Assistant. It hobbles the Chromecast so badly that there’s really no point in doing it — especially since it’s the same home screen, just without recommendations below your row of apps. You’d be better off just buying something else.
 But if you do go with the Chromecast, you’ll be pleased with its streaming quality. It consistently pulled down excellent 4K HDR streams without any noticeable artifacting or buffering interruptions. Performance is generally responsive when you’re browsing around, but I did run into a few instances of sluggishness — and every so often you’ll see a blank home screen with a loading animation as the Chromecast works to fill everything in.
   Android TV is still running the show underneath all this, so you can sideload apps, explore developer settings, and try to hack the Chromecast into doing whatever you want from it. You can pair Bluetooth gamepads (such as an Xbox One controller) to the Chromecast and try running Stadia or Xbox game streaming on the thing. No one’s stopping you, even if proper Stadia support isn’t coming until early next year. (I’ve confirmed that the Chromecast will accept a wired internet connection from some USB-C hubs with Ethernet.) As always, Google Assistant can control your smart home gadgets or update you on the weather. And you can set the Chromecast to cycle through your Google Photos library when in ambient mode, turning your TV into a giant picture frame.
  Google is making a big shift with the new Chromecast, and that doesn’t come without bugs and frustrations. Beyond the aforementioned sluggishness, there’s a small learning curve to the software; clicking on any regular-sized rectangle for a movie or show takes you to its Google TV details page, but click on any of the larger banners up top and you’re immediately fired into a streaming app. Google’s “continue watching” feature only supports select apps — Netflix yes, Prime Video no — so you can’t always quickly resume what you were just watching. Last, while I can appreciate the content-first focus of Google TV, it’d be nice to have  some level of home screen customization resembling what Android TV normally allows for. Aside from organizing your row of favorite apps how you want them, everything else has been tossed out in favor of a simpler lean-back experience.
   Even so, I’d rate the new Chromecast with Google TV as a big success. When it first debuted, the Chromecast stuck out as a unique, irresistibly cheap streaming device. But times have changed. With Roku and Amazon packing so much value into their own affordable hardware, Google couldn’t stick with the same formula of relaying content from phone to Chromecast anymore. Instead, it reinvented the Chromecast as an excellent 4K streamer that’s dramatically easier to use — turns out actual menus and a remote really do matter — without losing sight of what made the original great.

title: 谷歌Chromecast(2020)评论：对于4K设备和谷歌电视来说，物有所值是很棒的，但性能有时会下降，主屏幕不能定制
title_en: Google Chromecast (2020) review: excellent value for a 4K device and Google TV is great, but performance sometimes dips and home screen isn't customizable

note:

note_en:
Skip to main content                                                                                                                It’s time for Google to formally announce the products it’s already teased and that have, honestly, leaked a ton. We are expecting the new Pixel 5, Pixel 4A 5G, a new Chromecast, and a new Nest speaker. Google is calling it “Launch Night In” even though in the US it will be happening in the middle of the day, as a kind of light joke.
 Leaks are nothing new for Google, but what does feel new is seeing the company announce its products in late September ahead of new iPhones instead of in October, after them. Another unusual thing is that these Pixel phones aren’t expected to be fully flagship-level phones. The Pixel 4A 5G is clearly a big version of the already-released Pixel 4A, while the Pixel 5 won’t have the fastest processor available.
 Then there’s the Chromecast, which was already fully on sale at Home Depot a couple days before today’s event (oops). It finally comes with a remote control and runs its own Google TV interface instead of requiring you to run everything from your phone.
  Finally, a new Nest speaker that’s probably going to be the replacement for the original Google Home is coming.
 Will there be surprises? Maybe! We’ll be live blogging right here for those who can’t watch the video live — or for those who just want to watch along with us as we make some jokes. The event kicks off at 11AM PT / 2PM ET.

title: 边缘

note:
谷歌新推出的售价50美元、搭载谷歌电视的Chromecast将支持大多数人想要的许多流媒体服务，尽管Apple TV Plus似乎是一个引人注目的阻力。对于一个新平台来说，这些差距是相当正常的，但新的Chromecast确实有一个非常奇怪的遗漏：谷歌自己的游戏流媒体服务Stadia。在发布时，搭载谷歌电视的新Chromecast将不支持它。谷歌表示，支持将在2021年上半年的某个时候到来。
也就是说，我们能够使用侧加载在Chromecast上运行Stadia，这意味着不清楚为什么新的Chromecast不支持Stadia。为了达到一个我们可以推测的地方，我们需要解释一下谷歌电视Chromecast上运行的不同操作系统和服务的不同层。
首先，目前基于谷歌原始Chromecast平台的Chromecast Ultra支持Stadia。它没有自己的界面；它只根据你的手机(或你的体育场控制器)的指示从互联网上接收流媒体视频。
相比之下，搭载谷歌电视的新Chromecast有几层。基础是Android TV，这是新Chromecast的操作系统。这就是为什么新系统可以有一个你可以导航的用户界面和超过6500个应用程序。在Android TV之上是新的Google TV界面，这是一个以Google为中心的皮肤，为Android TV增色不少。最后，最顶层的是CAST--你仍然可以向Android电视设备投放视频，但不能投放体育场游戏。
如果让我们猜测，我们会说这三层中有两层存在问题。
如果我们必须猜测(我们差不多是这样做的)，我们会说这三层中的两层体育场都有问题。Stadia确实有一款适用于手机的Android应用程序，但显然，适用于电视的Android应用程序则是另一回事。您可能希望电视比手机有更高的帧频、更高的分辨率和更低的延迟。
目前，Stadia确实可以在Android电视上运行，但只是以一种非常奇怪的附加方式。正如9to5Google恰如其分地说的那样，它“仍然是一个硬邦邦的手机UI版本，对于非触摸屏来说真的不是很好”。
延迟也可能是Stadia不能在发布时简单地投射到新Chromecast的原因。由于它在Android TV上运行，而不是Chromecast Ultra中更简单的操作系统，因此带有Google TV的新Chromecast可能会给游戏流带来更多延迟。
谷歌显然相信它可以解决其中一个问题，并打算在未来九个月左右这样做。令人困惑的是，谷歌为什么没有在过去的九个月里解决这些问题，在其新的旗舰电视产品发布之前，该产品实际上将公司自己的名字嵌入到了品牌宣传中。
这是一个奇怪的选择，但如果你是Stadia用户，底线是你应该暂时坚持使用Chromecast Ultra。如果你想知道的话，你仍然可以购买一个作为100美元体育场首映版套件的一部分-但谷歌不再单独销售它们。
更新9月30日美国东部时间下午3：02：新增Chromecast Ultra不再单独销售。
note_en:
Google’s new $50 Chromecast with Google TV will support a lot of the streaming services most people would want, although Apple TV Plus appears to be a notable holdout. Those sorts of gaps are fairly normal for a new platform, but the new Chromecast does have one very strange omission: Google’s own game streaming service, Stadia. At launch, the new Chromecast with Google TV won’t support it. Google says support will come sometime in the first half of 2021.
 That said, we were able to  get Stadia running on the Chromecast using sideloading, which means it’s unclear  why Stadia isn’t supported on the new Chromecast. To get to a place where we can speculate, we need to explain the different layers of operating systems and services at play on the Chromecast with Google TV.
 First, right now Stadia is supported on the current Chromecast Ultra, which is based on Google’s original Chromecast platform. It doesn’t have an interface on its own; it only takes streaming video from the internet as directed by your phone (or your Stadia controller).
 The new Chromecast with Google TV, by comparison, has several layers. At the base is Android TV, the operating system for the new Chromecast. It’s what allows the new system to have a user interface you can navigate and over 6,500 apps. On top of Android TV is the new Google TV interface, a Google-centric skin that pretties up Android TV. Finally, at the very top there’s Cast — you can still cast videos to Android TV devices, just not Stadia games.
 If we had to guess we’d say that there are problems in two of those three layers
 If we had to guess (and we kind of do), we’d say that there are problems for Stadia in two of those three layers. Stadia does have an Android app for phones, but apparently an Android app for TVs is a different beast. You likely expect higher frame rates, higher resolutions, and lower latency on your TV than your phone.
 Currently, Stadia  does work on Android TV, but only in a very weird, tacked-on way. It’s “still a shoehorned version of the phone UI that really isn’t great for a non-touchscreen,” as   9to5Google aptly puts it.
 Latency may also be the reason that Stadia can’t simply be cast to the new Chromecast at launch. Since it runs on Android TV instead of the simpler OS in the Chromecast Ultra, the new Chromecast with Google TV may introduce more latency into the game stream.
 Google clearly believes it can solve one of those problems and intends to do so in the next nine months or so. What’s confusing is why Google didn’t solve them in the  last nine months, before the release of its new flagship TV product that literally has the company’s own name embedded in the branding.
 It’s a weird one, but if you’re a Stadia user the bottom line is that you should stick with the Chromecast Ultra for the time being. You can still buy one as part of  the $100 Stadia Premiere Edition kit, in case you’re wondering — but Google is no longer selling them separately.
  Update September 30th, 3:02PM ET:  Added that the Chromecast Ultra is no longer sold separately.
title: 谷歌的Chromecast和Google TV在发布时将不支持其游戏流媒体服务Stadia或Apple TV+；Stadia支持将在2021年上半年到来
title_en: Google's Chromecast with Google TV won't support Stadia, its game streaming service, or Apple TV+ at launch; Stadia support will arrive in first half of 2021

note:
谷歌对Chromecast系列给予适当的喜爱已经有一段时间了-对于一款已经进入第七个年头的相当成熟的设备来说，这或许并不令人惊讶。然而，在今天盛大的发布会上，该公司通过Chromecast和Google TV的方式为这款广受欢迎的电视加密狗带来了亟需的更新。
新版本的流媒体产品看起来与前一代非常相似，尽管完美的圆形被伸展成更长方形的形状，悬挂在HDMI电缆的末端。从硬件的角度来看，最大的变化是-据报道-增加了该产品最受欢迎的功能：遥控器。
这款遥控器又长又细(非常适合夹在沙发垫之间)，其特点是顶部有一个导航轮围绕着一个选择按钮，还有YouTube和Hulu的专用按钮。还有一个谷歌助手按钮和一个麦克风，两侧是电源键和输入键，可以进行语音控制。它使用包括在包装盒中的一对AAA电池。
另一项重大新增功能是谷歌电视(Google TV)。我已经在这里详细介绍了这个产品，但简而言之，它是该公司设计的一个新界面，旨在提供更流畅的观看体验。它将电影、电视节目和电视直播节目集中在一起-类似于你用Fire TV和Apple TV获得的东西。
新的加密狗可以支持4K HDR视频，速率高达每秒60帧。它还支持该公司的图像优化格式杜比视觉(Dolby Vision)。该系统支持来自85个网络的6500个应用程序和直播和点播电视，以及迪士尼+、HBO Max、Netflix等关键流媒体服务，当然还有YouTube。对孔雀的支持正在进行中，对谷歌体育场游戏产品的支持也在进行中，该产品将于明年上半年推出。
加密狗从今天开始在美国发售，售价50美元。澳大利亚、加拿大、法国、德国、爱尔兰、意大利、西班牙和英国的客户今天也可以预订。
note_en:
It’s been a while since  Google   gave its Chromecast line a proper bit of love — perhaps not surprising for a fairly mature device now marking its seventh year. At today’s big Launch Night In event, however, the company’s bringing the popular TV dongle a much-needed refresh by way of Chromecast with Google TV.
  The new version of the streaming product looks pretty similar to its predecessor, though the perfectly circular shape has been stretched out in something more oblong, dangling off the end of an HDMI cable. The biggest change from a hardware standpoint is the addition of — reportedly — the product’s most requested features: a remote.
   Long and slim (perfect for wedging between the couch cushions), the remote features a navigation wheel surrounding a selection button up top and devoted buttons for YouTube and Hulu. There’s also a Google Assistant button and a microphone flanked by the power and input buttons, which allows for voice control. It runs on a pair of AAA batteries, included in the box.
 The other big addition here is Google TV. I’ve  detailed the offering here, but the short version of it is that it’s a new interface from the company designed to offer a more streamlined viewing experience. It pulls together into a single spot movies, TV shows and live television programming — similar to what you get with something like Fire TV and Apple TV.
  The new dongle can support 4K HDR video at rates up to 60 frames a second. It also supports Dolby Vision, the company’s image optimization format. The system supports 6,500 apps and live and on-demand TV from 85 networks, as well as key streaming services like Disney+, HBO Max, Netflix and, of course, YouTube. Peacock support is on the way — as is support for Google’s Stadia gaming offering, which is set to arrive in the first half of next year.
  The dongle is available for sale in the U.S. starting today, priced at $50. Customers in Australia, Canada, France, Germany, Ireland, Italy, Spain and the U.K. can pre-order it today, as well.
title: 谷歌宣布Chromecast搭载谷歌电视流媒体加密狗和遥控器，今天在美国上市，售价50美元
title_en: Google announces Chromecast with Google TV streaming dongle and remote, available in the US today for $50

note:
不要与同名的智能电视平台(2010-2014，RIP)或其基础上的Android电视平台混淆，谷歌刚刚揭开了新的谷歌电视的面纱。这个名字指的是新的Chromecast与谷歌电视(Google TV)的界面，将流媒体服务、直播电视(通过YouTube TV)和各种其他谷歌产品结合到一个单一的、流线型的UI中。
从这个意义上说，新的谷歌电视类似于苹果和亚马逊的产品，提供了一种一站式服务，完全取代了有线电视。它与大多数顶级流媒体服务兼容，包括迪士尼+、france.tv、HBO Max、Netflix、乐天Viki，当然还有YouTube，NBC的孔雀(Peacock)很快就会推出。
在美国拥有YouTube TV会员资格的人可以收看电视直播。这项服务(承认价格昂贵，每月65美元)可以访问85个直播电台，包括CNN、ESPN和Nickelodeon，这些电台都可以通过Live标签获得。该公司还将在未来增加更多的直播电视提供商整合。
然而，这里真正的秘密武器似乎是潜在的搜索智慧，它是谷歌这么多业务的基础。以下是该公司在一篇博客文章中讨论这一新功能的内容：
为了建立这一点，我们研究了人们发现媒体的不同方式-从搜索特定标题到按类型浏览-并创建了一种帮助您以及观看哪些内容的体验。我们还改进了谷歌的知识图谱(Knowledge Graph)，这是我们如何理解和组织媒体的主题和流派，从关于太空旅行的电影到关于烹饪的真人秀节目。你还会看到在谷歌搜索上流行的书目，所以你总是可以找到一些及时和相关的东西。
用户可以通过语音搜索具体的推荐。他们还可以使用助手来获取天气、体育比分，并通过兼容的产品(如直接从电视机上的Nest)查看他们的安全摄像头。该系统建立在Android TV之上，这意味着谷歌电视在发布时与大约6500个应用程序兼容，并将在明年上半年支持该公司自己的流媒体游戏产品Stadia。当不使用时，环境模式将显示谷歌照片的幻灯片。
谷歌电视在Chromecast上可以与谷歌电视一起使用，谷歌电视今天推出，售价50美元。用户还可以将其作为新的谷歌电视应用程序的一部分访问，这是谷歌Play电影和安卓电视版的更新，该应用程序也将于今天发布。
note_en:
Not to be confused with the smart TV platform of the same name (2010-2014, RIP) or the Android TV platform it’s built on top of,  Google   has just taken the wraps off the new Google TV. The name refers to the interface for the new, aptly titled  Chromecast with Google TV, combining streaming services, live TV (via YouTube TV) and various other Google offerings into a single, streamlined UI.
 In that sense, the new Google TV is similar to offerings from Apple and Amazon, serving as a kind of one-stop-shop to replace cable TV outright. It works with most of the top streaming offerings, including Disney+, france.tv, HBO Max, Netflix, Rakuten Viki and, of course, YouTube, with NBC’s Peacock coming soon.
 Live TV is accessible for those who have a YouTube TV membership in the States. The (admittedly pricey at $65 a month) service brings access to 85 live stations, including the networks, CNN, ESPN and Nickelodeon, available via a Live tab. The company will also be adding additional live TV provider integration down the road.
   The real secret sauce here, however, seems to be the underlying search smarts that serve as the foundation for so much of what Google does. Here’s the company discussing the new feature in a blog post:
 To build this, we studied the different ways people discover media—from searching for a specific title to browsing by genre—and created an experience that helps you and what to watch. We also made improvements to Google’s Knowledge Graph, which is pa of how we beer understand and organize your media into topics and genres, from movies about space travel to reality shows about cooking. You’ll also see titles that are trending on Google Search, so you can always and something timely and relevant.
  Users can search for specific recommendations via voice. They can also use Assistant to get the weather, sports scores and view their security cams via compatible products like Nest straight from the TV set. The fact that the system is built on top of Android TV means that Google TV is compatible with some 6,500 apps at launch, with support for the company’s own streaming gaming offering, Stadia, coming in the first half of next year. When not in use, Ambient mode will display a slideshow of Google Photos.
  Google TV is available for   Chromecast with Google TV, which launches today at $50. Users can also access it as part of the new Google TV app — an update to Google Play Movies & TV for Android, which also arrives today.
title: 谷歌宣布了一项新的谷歌电视服务，通过YouTube TV将流媒体应用、统一搜索和直播电视整合到一个界面中
title_en: Google announces a new Google TV service that brings streaming apps, a unified search, and live TV, through YouTube TV, into a single interface

在经历了猜测、泄密、花絮和谣言之后，谷歌现在已经在网上的“Launch Night In”主题演讲中正式发布了Pixel 4a 5G。
从技术上讲，这款价格适中的手机仍然是Pixel 4a系列的一部分，尽管它是与旗舰Pixel 5一起发布的。考虑到这一点，它以跨越这两个价位的规格弥合了Pixel 4a和Pixel 5之间的差距。
作为2020年谷歌智能手机阵容中最大的一款，Pixel 4a 5G的尺寸为6.2英寸。显示屏左上角有一个冲孔凹槽，而OLED面板的分辨率为413ppi，分辨率为FHD+1080x2340像素。与Pixel5的90 Hz面板不同，Gorilla Glass 3显示屏的上限是60 Hz。它的下巴和前额也比它更优质的稳定面板略大。
在内部，Pixel 4a 5G封装在支持5G的高通骁龙765G芯片组中，并配有6 GB的RAM和128 GB的不可扩展UFS 2.1存储空间。性能水平应该接近Pixel5，尽管这款芯片组的基准测试水平与Google Pixel3系列中的高通骁龙845相似。然而，765G是更高效的芯片组。这一点应该被证明是重要的，因为Pixel 4a 5G有一个3800mAh的内部电池，可以通过18W USB-C快速充电来充电。
Pixel 4a 5G的摄像头设置与更高端的设备相同。它同样是1220万像素的主镜头和1600万像素的广角(107°和ƒ/2.2.2)，包括支持以240fps的1080p视频录制和4K 60fps的视频录制。前置自拍相机是一个800万像素的传感器，视野83°。
同样在Pixel4a5G的后面，你会发现一个电容式指纹识别器，沿着顶部挡板是一个3.5毫米的输入端口，用于有线音频连接。侧面的电源按钮也是略微着色的，这为这一次提供的哑光聚碳酸酯仅黑色选项增加了一点光泽。
谷歌此前证实，Pixel 4a 5G在美国的售价为499美元，在英国的售价为499美元，在大多数欧洲市场的售价为499欧元。这确实使其成为北美最便宜的支持5G的设备之一。
你正在阅读朝九晚五的谷歌新闻，这些专家日复一日地发布关于谷歌及其周边生态系统的新闻。请务必查看我们的主页以获取所有最新新闻，并关注Twitter、Facebook和LinkedIn上的朝九晚五谷歌，随时了解最新消息。不知道从何说起？查看我们的独家故事、评论、操作指南，并订阅我们的YouTube频道
note_en:
After speculation, leaks, tidbits, and rumors, Google has now officially launched the Pixel 4a 5G during the online “Launch Night In” keynote.
  The affordable handset is still technically part of the Pixel 4a series, despite being unveiled alongside the flagship Pixel 5. With that in mind, it bridges the gap between the Pixel 4a and the Pixel 5, with specifications that straddle the two price-points.
 As the largest of the 2020 Google smartphone lineup, the Pixel 4a 5G measures in at 6.2 inches. The display comes with an upper-left punch hole notch, while the OLED panel has an FHD+ 1,080 by 2,340-pixel resolution at 413ppi. The Gorilla Glass 3 display is capped at 60Hz, unlike the 90Hz panel found on the Pixel 5. It also has a slightly larger chin and forehead than it’s more premium stablemate.
 Inside, the Pixel 4a 5G packs in the 5G-enabled  Qualcomm Snapdragon 765G chipset and is paired with 6GB of RAM and 128GB of non-expandable UFS 2.1 storage. The performance levels should be close to the Pixel 5, although this chipset benchmarks at similar levels to that of the Qualcomm Snapdragon 845 found in the Google Pixel 3 series. However, the 765G is a more efficient chipset. This should prove to be important, as the Pixel 4a 5G has a 3,800mAh internal battery, which can be charged via 18W USB-C fast charging.
  The Pixel 4a 5G has a camera setup that is identical to the more premium device. It’s the same 12.2-megapixel main lens and 16-megapixel wide-angle (107° and ƒ/2.2) that includes support for 1080p video recording at 240FPS and 4K 60fps video recording. The front-facing selfie camera is an 8-megapixel sensor with an 83° FOV.
 Also at the rear of the Pixel 4a 5G, you’ll find a capacitive fingerprint reader and along the top bezel is a 3.5mm input port for wired audio connections. The side power button is also slightly colored, which adds a little flair to the matte polycarbonate Just Black color option on offer this time around.
 Google  had previously confirmed that the Pixel 4a 5G would be available for  $499 in the US, £499 in the UK, and €499 in most European markets. This does make this one of the cheapest 5G-enabled devices available in North America.
  You’re reading 9to5Google — experts who break news about Google and its surrounding ecosystem, day after day. Be sure to check out  our homepage for all the latest news, and follow 9to5Google on  Twitter,  Facebook, and  LinkedIn to stay in the loop. Don’t know where to start? Check out our  exclusive stories,  reviews,  how-tos, and  subscribe to our YouTube channel
title: 谷歌推出Pixel 4a 5G，6.2英寸显示屏，6 GB内存，128 GB存储空间，高通765G芯片组，18W USB-C快速充电，售价499美元
title_en: Google unveils Pixel 4a 5G with a 6.2" display, 6GB of RAM, 128GB storage, Qualcomm's 765G chipset, and 18W USB-C fast charging for $499

谷歌开始在Android上为谷歌照片推出一种新的编辑模式，该模式增加了机器学习驱动的自动建议，并改进了工具，以实现更精细的手动控制，帮助你的照片看起来更好。
最大的变化是在照片编辑菜单中增加了一个新的“建议”选项卡，它将为你当前查看的特定照片提供编辑建议，自动调整“亮度、对比度和肖像效果”等内容。广泛的编辑也只是一个起点-谷歌还会向你展示它所做的编辑，并让你进一步调整它们。
首先，谷歌提供了一些基本的建议选项，比如“增强”(Enhance)和“彩色流行”(Color Pop)，但该公司承诺，在接下来的几个月里，它将继续扩大针对特定类型的图像(如肖像、风景或日落)进行优化的选项阵容，首先是Pixel手机。
谷歌还为其通用编辑工具推出了新的界面，包括亮度、对比度、饱和度、暖度、白点、模糊等，让用户更容易滚动每个选项，并根据相关图像进行调整。
新的谷歌照片编辑工具今天应该会在Android设备上推出。没有宣布iOS的发布日期。
note_en:
Google is starting to  roll out a new editing mode for Google Photos on Android, which adds machine learning-powered automatic suggestions, and improved tools for more granular manual controls to help make your photos look even better.
 The biggest change is a new “Suggestions” tab in the photo editing menu, which will offer recommendations for edits for the specific photo you’re currently looking at, automatically adjusting things like “brightness, contrast, and portrait effects.” The broad edits are also just a starting point — Google will also show you what edits it made, and let you tweak them further.
   To start, Google is offering some basic options for suggestions, like “Enhance” and “Color Pop,” but the company promises it’ll continue to expand its lineup of options optimized around specific types of images (like portraits, landscapes, or sunsets) in the coming months, starting with Pixel phones.
 Google is also rolling out a new interface for its general editing tools, for things like brightness, contrast, saturation, warmth, white point, blur, and more, making it easier for users to scroll through each option and adjust it for the image in question.
   The new Google Photos editing tools should be rolling out on Android devices today. No iOS release date was announced.
title: 谷歌在Android上推出了更新的谷歌照片编辑器，并提供了建议选项卡，推荐了诸如Color Pop和Enhance等编辑功能
title_en: Google is rolling out an updated Google Photos editor on Android with a Suggestions tab, recommending edits like Color Pop and Enhance

note:
现在是10月份，所以尽管这一年我们过得很奇怪，谷歌还是举办了一场(虚拟)活动，展示其最新的智能手机Pixel5。是的，它有5G连接。这款手机也比去年的手机便宜了很多，起价为699美元。
像往常一样，关于Pixel5的大量细节提前泄露，我们也知道今年夏天上市的Pixel4a会带来什么。4a最值得注意的设计变化是它的无缺口屏幕，包括一个针孔前置摄像头。Pixel5也有相同风格的屏幕--不出所料，它是一块6英寸、2340x1080的屏幕，位于Pixel4的5.7英寸显示屏和4XL的6.3英寸显示屏之间。(说到XL，今年没有；只有一款Pixel5。)。它还包括谷歌在去年的Pixel4中引入的更快的90 Hz刷新率。
和去年的Pixel一样，5的背面也有一个双摄像头。但谷歌没有采用标准的长焦镜头，而是将长焦镜头换成了超广角镜头。考虑到像这样的摄像头在苹果和三星(以及其他公司)的手机上是多么受欢迎，看到谷歌在这里落伍也就不足为奇了。谷歌在过去几款手机中使用的1200万像素传感器也在这里，但这一次它与广角拍摄手机的1600万像素传感器配对。
谷歌还找回了去年Pixel 4中丢失的指纹传感器。面部解锁功能并没有引起轰动，今年也找不到奇怪的非触摸式控制(由屏幕上方的超宽带雷达传感器供电)。这并不是一个巨大的损失，因为谷歌的Motion Sense功能只是一个噱头。
至于内部结构，谷歌没有在Pixel5中安装最新、最好的处理器。正如人们所怀疑的那样，谷歌在这方面偷工减料，很可能是以负担得起的名义。处理器是骁龙765G，Pixel5有8 GB的RAM。这些规格比你在最新的三星旗舰机型上发现的更朴素，但考虑到Pixel4a在更普通的硬件上运行得很好，我们希望5应该也能同样快。
大多数Pixel手机最大的问题之一就是电池续航时间。我们不能保证Pixel5会堆积起来，但好消息是，它至少包括一个4000mAh的电池，比之前Pixel手机的电池大得多。Pixel 5包含齐无线充电功能，可以共享电池为一组Pixel Buds无线充电。它也是防水的；就像无线充电一样，这是它与更便宜的Pixel4a的另一个不同之处。
今年，Pixel5只有两种颜色-黑色和鼠尾草绿色-起价699美元，128 GB存储空间。
note_en:
It’s October, so despite the weird year we’re having, Google is hosting a (virtual) event to show off its latest smartphone,  the Pixel 5. And yes, it has 5G connectivity on board. It’s also a lot cheaper than last year’s phone,  starting at $699.
 As usual, plenty of details about the Pixel 5 leaked in advance, and we also got an idea of what to expect from the Pixel 4a, which arrived this summer. The most notable design change for the 4a was its no-notch screen, which included a pinhole front-facing camera. The same style screen is here on the Pixel 5 — as expected, it’s a 6-inch, 2340 x 1080 screen that sits between the 5.7-inch display on the Pixel 4 and the 6.3-inch one on the 4 XL. (Speaking of the XL, there isn’t one this year; there’s just one Pixel 5.) It also includes the faster 90Hz refresh rate Google introduced in last year’s Pixel 4.
  Like last year’s Pixel, the 5 has a dual camera on the back. But instead of going with the standard and telephoto arrangement, Google swapped out the telephoto lens for an ultra wide angle shooter. Given how popular cameras like this have been on phones from Apple and Samsung (among others), it’s not a big surprise to see Google fall in line here. The same 12-megapixel sensor that Google has used for its last few phones is here, but this time it’s paired with a 16-megapixel sensor for the wide-angle shooter.
 Google is also bringing back the fingerprint sensor that went missing from last year’s Pixel 4. Gone is the face unlock feature that didn’t quite set the world on fire as are the odd touch-less controls (that were powered by an ultra-wideband radar sensor above the screen) are nowhere to be found this year. Not a huge loss, as Google’s Motion Sense feature never turned out to be more than a gimmick.
 As for the internals, Google isn’t putting the latest and greatest processor inside the Pixel 5. As suspected, the company is cutting a corner here, likely in the name of affordability. The processor is a Snapdragon 765G, and the Pixel 5 has 8GB of RAM. Those specs are more modest than you’ll find on the latest Samsung flagship, but given how well the Pixel 4a runs on even more modest hardware, we’re hoping the 5 should be similarly speedy.
 One of the big knocks on most Pixel phones has been battery life. We can’t vouch for how the Pixel 5 will stack up, but the good news is that it at least includes a 4,000mAh battery, which is much larger than the batteries in previous Pixel phones. The Pixel 5 includes Qi wireless charging, and you can share the battery to wirelessly charge up a set of Pixel Buds. It’s also water-resistant; like wireless charging, this is another feature to differentiate it from the cheaper Pixel 4a.
 This year, the Pixel 5 comes in just two colors — black and sage green — and starts at $699 with 128GB of storage.
title: 谷歌推出Pixel5，配备6英寸90 Hz OLED显示屏，超宽后置摄像头，而不是变焦镜头，5G，8 GB RAM，背面有指纹传感器，售价699美元
title_en: Google unveils Pixel 5 with a 6-inch 90Hz OLED display, ultrawide rear-facing camera instead of zoom lens, 5G, 8GB RAM, and fingerprint sensor on back for $699

note:
周三，Palantir在纽约证券交易所(New York Stock Exchange)首次亮相，股价开盘报10美元，并攀升至11.42美元的高点。
为政府机构和大公司开发数据分析软件的Palantir将其股票直接上市，让现有股东有机会将最多20%的股份出售给新投资者。云软件开发商Asana周三也通过直接上市的方式上市。
根据16.5亿股已发行股票，初始价格使Palantir的市值达到165亿美元，其中不包括各种限制性股票单位(RSU)、期权和未归属股票。完全稀释后的股票数量为21.7亿股，因此，随着期权、RSU和未授权单位转换为普通股，Palantir的股票市值将大幅上升。
成立于2003年的Palantir的股票多年来一直在私募市场上广泛交易，尽管该公司一直在努力维持2015年一轮融资中204亿美元的估值。当时该股估值为11.38美元，今年的交易价格在4.17美元至11.50美元之间。
纽约证交所周二给出的参考价为每股7.25美元，但没有股票在这个水平上易手。
Palantir愿意与美国移民和海关执法局等机构做生意，以及联合创始人彼得·蒂尔、首席执行官亚历克斯·卡普和斯蒂芬·科恩拥有超大控制权的第三类股票的治理结构，引发了争议。这家公司是硅谷创立的，但它试图将总部迁至科罗拉多州，并在招股说明书中猛烈抨击科技工程精英，从而与该地区保持距离。
卡普在文件中写道，与我们国家的国防和情报机构合作的软件项目，其任务是保障我们的安全，已经变得有争议，而依靠广告收入建立的公司也是司空见惯的。
卡普的信是对Facebook的一次不那么微妙的抨击，Thiel在Facebook赚了很多钱，现在仍然是董事会成员。通过他的各种投资实体，泰尔是Palantir&#39；的最大股东。
Palantir在上周的一份最新申报文件中表示，预计今年将实现42%的增长，2020年收入将达到10.6亿美元。调整后的营业收入将达到1.21亿美元，不包括基于股票的薪酬和其他成本，利润率为11.5%。
自2019年以来，收入增长正在加速，当时该公司报告增长25%，至7.426亿美元。Palantir表示，预计2021年收入增长将超过30%。
该公司现在允许现有股东出售最多五分之一的股份，同时保留其余股份，直到公布截至12月31日的年度业绩后锁定期到期。Palantir表示，首日交易将有4.758亿股可供出售。
Palantir面临的挑战是让投资者相信，它更像是一家高增长的科技公司，而不是一家低利润率的咨询服务公司。该公司只有125名客户，2019年的平均消费为560万美元。
Palantir一直在投资创造一种更容易销售和部署的产品。它希望投资者专注于该公司所称的贡献利润率，即减去产生销售所承担的成本后剩余的收入。这一数字从去年同期的18%攀升至第二季度的55%。
Palantir曾七次入选CNBC颠覆者50家公司之一，最近一次是在2019年排名第34位。
note_en:
Palantir shares opened at $10 on Wednesday in the company's debut on the New York Stock Exchange, and climbed as high as $11.42.
 Palantir, which develops data analysis software for government agencies and large companies, held a direct listing of its stock, giving existing shareholders the opportunity to sell up to 20% of their stake to new investors. Cloud software developer  Asana also went public via direct listing on Wednesday.
  The initial price gives Palantir a market cap of $16.5 billion, based on 1.65 billion shares outstanding, which excludes various restricted stock units (RSUs), options and unvested stock. The fully diluted share count is 2.17 billion, so Palantir's stock market value will rise significantly as options, RSUs and unvested units convert to common stock.
 Shares of Palantir, founded in 2003, have been widely traded on the private market for years, though the company has struggled to maintain the $20.4 billion valuation from a 2015 financing round. The stock at that time was valued at $11.38 and  traded this year for between $4.17 and $11.50.
 The NYSE gave a  reference price on Tuesday of $7.25 a share, though no stock changed hands at that level.
 Palantir has sparked controversy for its willingness to do business with agencies like  U.S Immigration and Customs Enforcement and for a governance structure that gives co-founders Peter Thiel, CEO Alex Karp and Stephen Cohen a third class of stock with outsized control. The company is a creation of Silicon Valley, but has tried to distance itself from the region by moving its headquarters to Colorado and  slamming tech's "engineering elite" in its prospectus.
 "Software projects with our nation's defense and intelligence agencies, whose missions are to keep us safe, have become controversial, while companies built on advertising dollars are commonplace," Karp wrote in the filing.
  Karp's letter was a less-than-subtle jab at  Facebook, where Thiel made much of his fortune and still sits on the board. Through his various investing entities, Thiel is Palantir's largest shareholder.
  Palantir said in an updated filing  last week that it expects to record growth this year of 42%, to close 2020 with $1.06 billion in revenue. Adjusted operating income will come in at $121 million, excluding stock-based compensation and other costs, for a margin of 11.5%.
 Revenue growth is accelerating from 2019, when the company reported a 25% increase to $742.6 million. For 2021, Palantir said it expects revenue growth of greater than 30%.
 The company is allowing existing shareholders to sell up to one-fifth of their holdings now while hanging onto the rest until the lockup period expires after it reports results for the year ending Dec. 31. Palantir said 475.8 million shares will be available for sale on the first day of trading.
 The challenge for Palantir is convincing investors that it's more of a high-growth tech company than a low-margin consulting services firm. The company has only 125 customers, spending on average $5.6 million in 2019.
 Palantir has been investing in creating a product that's easier to sell and deploy. It wants investors to concentrate on what the company calls its contribution margin, or the revenue left after subtracting the costs it bears to generate sales. That number climbed to 55% in the second quarter from 18% a year earlier.
 Palantir was named one of  CNBC's Disruptor 50 companies seven times, most recently ranking No. 34 in 2019.
title: Palantir在纽约证交所直接上市后的开盘价为每股10美元，参考价为7.25美元
title_en: Palantir opens at $10 per share following its direct listing on the NYSE, after having a reference price of $7.25

note:
自2019年正式启动以来，我们的团队一直在努力执行我们的愿景，为人类建立一个广泛的知识数据库和图形，包括实用的商业工具和社区功能，以帮助发现和决策。今天，我们有一些好消息！我非常自豪地宣布，我们已经筹集了1450万美元的首轮融资，使我们的总融资略低于2000万美元，其中以16z为首，马克·安德森(Marc Andreessen)加入了董事会。
这些投资者加入了Golden种子轮的先前投资者的行列，其中包括a16z(共同领导种子轮)、Gigafund、Founders Fund、SV Angel、代表Liquid 2 Ventures的Joe Montana、Aston Motes(Dropbox的第一名员工)、Christina Brodbeck(YouTube的第一位设计师)、Lee Linden、Immad Akhund(我在Heyzap的联合创始人，现为水星公司首席执行官)、乔什·巴克利、詹姆斯·史密斯(Bugsnag首席执行官)、詹姆斯·坦普林(Firebase创始人)、杰克·史密斯、Incubus的迈克·艾因齐格、Sumon Sadhu、保罗·麦克凯勒(Square)，特里普·阿德勒(Scribd首席执行官)和其他许多伟大的天使。
除了加薪，我们还想宣布，我们已经与美国空军签订了一份价值100万美元的合同，利用从零散的公共来源获得的信息和知识来帮助打击新冠肺炎。
我们将利用我们的首轮资金进一步扩大团队、产品能力和数据集。
自从我们推出第一个商业产品以来，我们已经执行了路线图的第一阶段，构建了客户请求的功能，并承担了一些新试验的风险：
使用Golden Knowledge Graph Powered List编辑感兴趣的主题：根据客户反馈，我们添加了构建实体和主题的自定义列表的功能。通过设置特定的规范列，您可以创建自我更新的数据的实时视图--随着Golden Knowledge Graph不断变化，您自己的数据视图也会发生变化。不再有死的电子表格🙂。
使用规范实体上的专用字段管理您的组织知识：除了规范字段之外，我们还为您添加了将私有字段添加到规范实体或主题的功能。它存储在您自己的私人组织视图中，并且仅供您的团队访问。不必维护具有规范答案的字段、获得您自己的自定义字段的私密性以及具有规范字段和私有字段的比较价值有很大的好处。我们很高兴看到这将在打开存储组织知识的大门，而不需要重新发明轮子的情况下，当涉及到关于实体的知识时，仍然允许组织所需的隐私，我们很高兴看到这一点。
使用查询模板使查询更容易：我们在很多方面升级了我们的Golden query工具--从外观到更多功能元素。这包括请求关于给定查询的实体或整个列的特定属性的数据的能力，直接从查询工具编辑黄金知识图的能力，以及使用查询模板快速构建查询的能力。
利用搜索请求引擎的扩展实现更高精度的搜索：在Golden上，我们试图通过构建各种流来捕获不同抽象级别的请求，从而将以前通过长篇大论的网络搜索手动完成的研究成果付诸实践。
付费用户可以请求关于一个实体或主题或特定查询的丰富、深入的信息，例如“谁是德克萨斯州60英里范围内的所有PPE制造商”或围绕一组主题的信息汇编(我们称之为集群)。我们现在已将其扩展为请求主题的特定属性，例如“该公司的位置是什么”或“该产品的权重”或“该特定立法的发布日期”。
当我们收到此请求时，我们会在特定的时间范围内执行它，并将其返回给客户端以获取反馈。随着时间的推移，这越来越多地建立起公共黄金知识库。双赢！从某种意义上说，我们已经有效地对规范信息进行了“SLA”研究。
通过扩展我们的规范字段来获取更丰富的数据：我们通过包括新字段来改进我们的实体模型：例如，“竞争”、“应用商店链接”、D-U-N-S编号和许多其他字段。我们一直在听取客户和用户的请求，以捕获我们没有的字段，并继续添加新字段，以获得有关主题或实体的全面结构化数据。
API的扩展：除了API的丰富和发现用例之外，我们还将研究请求模型带到了我们的API中。因此，您不仅可以通过我们的网站请求某个主题的规范数据，还可以使用我们的API以编程方式完成此操作，并通过Web挂钩接收返回的数据。
使用主题快速查看维护上下文：在Golden Data的某些视图中，特别是在Golden Query工具和列表中，用户现在可以快速预览主题，而不必离开该特定视图。这对于快速查看许多主题和实体非常有用。
使用双歧义模式导航命名相似的实体：当编辑Golden时，搜索主题和实体可能会遇到歧义消除问题，现在可以查看所有可能相关的主题和实体，从而更容易选择正确的实体。这在我们运营的实体数量规模上很重要。
新的用户文档：我们最近重写、重组和扩展了我们的用户文档，以涵盖Golden中的所有新功能，并使现有功能的文档更清晰、更有帮助。
数据永远更多：我们已经构建了许多新的数据集和数据管道，以更快的速度将数据输入Golden。我们已经在我们的数据库中添加了数百万个实体，还有更多的事实。我们已经将集群扩展到新冠肺炎、核糖核酸治疗、脑机接口等领域，开启了对新冠肺炎疫苗、测试公司、独角兽、最新一批YCS20先进材料公司、核电公司等众多领域的新查询。我们扩大了我们的实体类型，包括战略合作伙伴关系、临床试验、产品、立法等。
我迫不及待地想看看Gold Platform在我们的下一阶段将如何发展，我真的很兴奋能与我们的团队、客户和社区一起将产品带到一个新的水平。如果您有兴趣成为客户，请在此处请求演示或直接给我们发电子邮件与我们联系。
我们正在寻找多个职位的招聘人员，包括NLP专家、数据工程师、数据科学家、数据工程主管、爬虫专家、ML基础设施专家、内部招聘人员、商业和政府领域的初始销售人员、工程领导和首席营销职位。如果您感兴趣(或者看到一个我们没有提到但对我们的任务至关重要的角色)，请与我们联系。
note_en:
Since we  formally launched in 2019, our team has been hard at work executing our vision to build an extensive database and graph of knowledge for humanity, including practical  commercial tools and community features to aid discovery and decisions. Today, we have some great news! I’m very proud to announce that we have raised a $14.5m Series A, bringing our total funding to just under $20m, led by  a16z with  Marc Andreessen joining the board.
   These investors join prior investors in Golden’s seed round including a16z (who co-led the seed round), Gigafund,  Founders Fund,  SV Angel,  Joe Montana on behalf of  Liquid 2 Ventures,  Aston Motes (1st employee at  Dropbox),  Christina Brodbeck (1st designer of  YouTube),  Lee Linden,  Immad Akhund (my cofounder at  Heyzap, now CEO of  Mercury),  Josh Buckley,  James Smith (CEO of  Bugsnag),  James Tamplin (Founder of  Firebase),  Jack Smith,  Mike Einziger of Incubus,  Sumon Sadhu,  Paul McKellar ( Square founding team),  Trip Adler (CEO of  Scribd) and many other great angels.
 In addition to the raise, we’d like to announce we have closed a $1m contract with the U.S. Air Force to help fight COVID-19 with information and knowledge derived from fragmented public sources.
 We will be using our Series A funding to further build out the team, product capabilities and datasets.
  Since we launched  our first commercial offering, we have gone on to execute the first phase of our roadmap, build out client requested features and take risks with some new experiments:
 Compiling topics of interest using Golden Knowledge Graph powered Lists: Based on client feedback we have added the ability to construct custom lists of entities and topics. By setting up specific canonical columns, you can create a live view of data which self updates -- as the Golden Knowledge Graph keeps changing, your own data view also changes. No more dead spreadsheets 🙂
  Managing your organizations' knowledge using p rivate fields on canonical entities: In addition to canonical fields, we have added the ability for you to add private fields to a canonical entity or topic. This is stored in your own private organization’s view and accessible to your team only. There is great advantage to not having to maintain fields that have canonical answers, getting the privacy for your own custom fields and having the comparative value of canonical fields alongside private fields. We are excited to see where this goes in terms of opening the door to storing organizations’ knowledge without reinventing the wheel when it comes to knowledge on entities but still allowing the privacy organizations require.
  Making querying easier with q uery templates: We have upgraded our  Golden Query Tool in many ways -- from look and feel to more functional elements. This includes the ability to request data on a particular attribute of an entity or entire column for a given query, editing the Golden Knowledge Graph directly from the query tool, and using query templates to short cut constructing queries.
  Research with higher precision with the e xtension of the Research Request engine: On Golden we have attempted to productize research that has previously occurred manually via long winded web searches by building various flows that capture requests at different levels of abstraction.
 Paying users can request rich, deep information about an entity or topic or a specific query e.g. ‘who are all the PPE manufacturers within 60 miles of Texas’ or a compilation of information around a group of topics (what we call a cluster). We have now extended this to request a specific attribute of a topic e.g. ‘what is the location of this company’ or ‘weight of this product’ or ‘date this particular legislation was released’.
 When we get this request we execute it within a certain time frame and get it back over to the client for feedback. Over time this increasingly builds out the public Golden Knowledge Base. Win-win! In a sense, we have effectively ‘SLAed’ research into canonical information.
  Getting to richer data by e xtending our canonical fields: We have improved our entity model by including new fields: for example, ‘competition’, ‘app store links’ 'D-U-N-S number' and many others. We have been listening to customers and users requests to capture fields that we didn’t have and continue to keep adding new fields to get comprehensive structured data on a topic or entity.
 Expansion of the API: In addition to the enrichment and discovery use cases of the  API, we have brought the  research request model to our API. So not only can you request canonical data on a topic via our site, you can do so programmatically with our API and receive the data back via web-hooks.
 Maintaining context with  Topic Quick View : In certain views of Golden data, specifically in the Golden Query Tool and Lists, users can now see a quick preview of a topic without having to leave that particular view. This can be useful for quickly reviewing many topics and entities.
  Navigating similarly named entities with d isambiguation mode: When editing Golden, searching for topics and entities can run into disambiguation issues, it’s now possible to view all the topics and entities which could be relevant making it easier to select the correct entity. This matters at the scale of entity count we are operating at.
  New user docs: We’ve recently rewritten, restructured and expanded  our user documentation to cover all the new features in Golden, and to make documentation of existing features clearer and more helpful.
 Always more data: We have built out many new data sets and data pipelines to feed data into Golden at a faster rate. We’ve added millions of  entities into our database, and many more facts. We’ve expanded  clusters into areas such as  COVID-19,  RNA therapeutics,  Brain-Computer Interfaces, opened new queries into  COVID-19 vaccines,  testing companies,  unicorns,  the latest YCS20 batch   advanced materials companies,  nuclear power companies and many more. We expanded our entity types to include things like strategic partnerships, clinical trials,  products,  legislation and more.
 I can’t wait to see how the Golden platform will evolve in our next phase and am really excited to take the product to the next level with our team, customers and community.    If you are interested in being a customer please contact us by requesting a demo  here or emailing us directly.
  We are looking for hires across multiple  positions including  NLP specialists,  data engineers, data scientists, a  head of data engineering, crawler specialists, ML infrastructure specialists, an  internal recruiter, initial  sales people in both commercial and government arenas, engineering leadership and lead marketing positions. If you are interested (or see a role we didn’t mention but would be critical to our mission)  please get in touch.

title_en: Golden raises $14.5M Series A led by a16z and Marc Andreessen joins board
